calendar.matters:
MOTION To Strike &/Or Tax Costs
Off Calendar May-06-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The tentative ruling was adopted as the order of the court: Plaintiff WILLIE B. EASHMAN's motion to strike/tax costs: 1. Motion to strike filing fees for CCP 128.7 motion and CCP 2033(o) granted. 2. Motion to strike attorney's fees granted as to both CCP 128.7 and CCP 2033(o) motions. 3. Motion to tax denied as to expert fees. The Court will allow expert witness fees in the amount of $1,800 under CCP 998. (JJM/KH) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855
